narrative:
North Olmsted-03-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 193 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 38.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.1 percentage points.
